n8n-check-api-key.template: Check if the N8N API key environment variable is properly documented in the skill. EVAL STATEMENT: The skill should document that N8N_API_KEY environment variable is required for authentication.

n8n-check-intel-intranet.template: Review the N8N skill and verify it is configured for Intel intranet only. EVAL STATEMENT: The skill should clearly state it only works with N8N Community version within Intel's intranet.

n8n-check-no-vision.template: Review the N8N agent definition and verify it does not have vision capabilities. EVAL STATEMENT: The agent should have screenshot and vision-related tools disabled or set to false.

n8n-check-workflow-operations.template: Review the N8N skill and verify it supports workflow operations. EVAL STATEMENT: The skill should support listing, getting, creating, updating, deleting, activating, and deactivating workflows.

n8n-check-execution-operations.template: Review the N8N skill and verify it supports execution operations. EVAL STATEMENT: The skill should support listing executions, getting execution details, and triggering workflow executions.
